operator_msg: Shutdown Boiler E, to achieve HP steam production as per optimized HP steam demand
Boiler load to be reduced with optimization of steam dumping/ steam venting. Refer optimization results for load biasing to individual boilers
Switch off Air Compressor motor C to reduce venting of air.
Switch off FD Fan-E as Boiler-E can be shut down
Decrease the IGV opening of Air Compressor  B to decrease air supply, which will help reduce air venting
Margin available in C3R RPM, Reduce the letdown opening PV-7026, this will reduce the shaft loss and reduce the C3R suction pressure
